changes.value:
File: llama-embedding/src/model.rs (0% coverage, 0/109 lines)

Entirely untested. Key functions:
- LlamaModel::new() - creates model from config path
- TextEmbedder::load() - loads GGUF model into memory
- TextEmbedder::embed_text() - tokenize + forward pass + extract embedding
- embedding_dimension(), is_loaded()

Requires a real GGUF model file on disk. Consider a small test model or #[ignore] tests that run only when the model is available. At minimum, test error paths (missing model file, invalid path)."
